'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 131''' was the one hundred thirty-first issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[June 30]], [[2004]]. It was authored by [[Darren Allanson]], [[Andrew Darling]], and [[Matthew Harvey]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

*[[Darth Krayt|A'Sharad Hett]]
*[[:Category:Music|Music and Musicians]]
*Galactic Food and Drink
